# Mantosh Kumar

Canonical URL: https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/

Mantosh Kumar is a Staff Software Engineer who writes about platform engineering, automation, distributed systems, developer productivity, and operational intelligence.

## Areas of expertise

- Platform engineering and internal developer platforms
- Workflow automation and engineering productivity
- Distributed systems and backend architecture
- Operational intelligence and release-health reporting
- Privacy-conscious browser-side engineering

## Important pages

- [Home and engineering positioning](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/)
- [Engineering systems catalog](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/systems/)
- [Engineering writing and notes](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/thinking/)
- [Engineering experience timeline](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/experience/)
- [Resume](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/resume/)
- [Contact Mantosh Kumar](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/contact/)

## Featured projects

- [PhotoSahi: privacy-first browser image processing case study](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/projects/photosahi.html)
- [Workflow Automation Toolkit repository](https://github.com/mantoshkumar1/automated-Life)

## Ask Mantosh

Ask Mantosh is an AI interface to Mantosh's published engineering knowledge. It is intended to answer from documented public work and provide source links when available.
